reviews.comment:
Exelente atención, mientras cargas combustible te dicen cada lugar a visitar para que no te pierdas nada

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; while you're refueling, they tell you about every place to visit so you don't miss anything.

Punto obligado. Las instalaciones están perfectas. Mucha gente...

A must-see. The facilities are perfect. Very crowded...

reviews.comment:
Pocos surtidores, puede haber grandes esperas en horario pico.
En Abril 2023, disponian de todos los combustibles y aceptan todos los medios de pago.
buena limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
Few pumps, so there can be long waits during peak hours.
In April 2023, they had all fuels available and accepted all forms of payment.
The restrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSd2EyQWNBEAE
